task_name: Apache Error Log - Rank Top Error Types
notes: Excellent execution. Agent correctly identified all major error categories with precise counts (753 total). 'Directory index forbidden' at rank 1 with 224 occurrences matches expected values exactly. 'File does not exist' errors intelligently sub-grouped into 5 detailed categories (IIS/FrontPage, Nimda/CodeRed, /sumthin, /cgi, drive-letter probes) totaling 226, which aligns with expected ~200+ and follows acceptable grouping strategy per instructions. All 13 error types ranked correctly. Invalid HTTP method errors (19) and server-internal mod_jk/JNI factory errors all properly captured. JSON structure conforms to specification. Security implications clearly explained for each category. Minor point: counts on some subcategories could potentially be verified against raw log, but overall analysis is thorough and well-reasoned.
